entries.detail: Continuation from session 6790c561ea174275. Previous session completed Indexer Jetty fix, FlexibleDateDeserializer, and SUBMITTER fix. User wants SUBMITTER changes undone. mvn clean verify -pl booking -am completed successfully (exit code 0) and log is at /tmp/mvn-verify.log.

entries.summary: All tasks completed: SUBMITTER undo, JAR verification, test categorization, document update, mvn commands
entries.detail:
1. SUBMITTER code change reverted from ValidationContext.java (removed SUBMITTER case from switch)
2. SUBMITTER test methods reverted from ValidationContextTest.java (removed 4 tests: testIsActivatedSubmitterCompanyIdIn, testIsActivatedSubmitterCompanyIdNotIn, testIsActivatedSubmitterCompanyIdNotMatching, testIsActivatedSubmitterNullActor)
3. mvn clean verify -pl booking -am → BUILD SUCCESS
   - Surefire JUnit5: 1837 tests, 0 failures, 1 skipped
   - Surefire TestNG: 913 tests (was 917, minus 4 SUBMITTER tests), 0 failures, 9 skipped
   - Failsafe DynamoDB IT: 138 tests, 0 failures
   - Failsafe Flow/Service IT: 149 tests, 0 failures
   - Total: 3037 tests, 0 failures
4. Verified fixes in new clean-build JAR:
   - booking-lambdas-1.0.jar (75MB): Indexer.class uses UncheckedIOException, FlexibleDateDeserializer present, ContainerType has @JsonDeserialize
   - booking-1.0.jar (134MB): FlexibleDateDeserializer present, ContainerType has @JsonDeserialize
5. Summary document updated with SUBMITTER undo, detailed test tables (200 JUnit classes, 69 TestNG classes, 9 DynamoDB IT classes, 19 Flow/Service IT classes), and mvn command reference
